signals.reasoning: BTC still lacks a clean edge. Price is slightly down on 24h, funding is mixed, and the board is neutral. With no position to manage, this remains a pass rather than a compelling new signal.

ETH is one of the cleaner bearish majors here: price is down more than 3% on 24h, funding has turned positive, and the mechanical bias leans bearish. Confidence remains moderate because the move is not violently expanding and this is still a fresh entry, not a management action.

SOL is weak but not cleanly weak enough to press. Funding is mixed, the board is mostly neutral, and there is no strong squeeze or unwind profile. Best to stay selective rather than force a mediocre short.

KAITO keeps one of the cleaner small-cap bearish profiles: price is down materially, funding is positive, and the mechanical board is outright bearish. Liquidity is not great, so size should stay controlled, but directionally this is one of the better short candidates in the set.

SKR is similar to KAITO but a touch weaker on structure quality because of the wider spread and thinner tape. Still, price is down, longs are paying funding, and the board is unambiguously bearish, which makes it a valid tactical short candidate.

The coin is still up strongly, but quality is poor: spread is wide, liquidity is thin, and the board is neutral rather than truly squeeze-driven. This is not a disciplined new long despite the green tape.

FARTCOIN remains a credible bearish continuation candidate: price is down more than 10% on 24h, funding is still positive, and liquidity is much better than the other small-cap shorts. It is not a perfect crowded short, but among the bearish names this is one of the more executable setups.

Best offensive long in this request. Price is still up more than 30% on 24h, funding is negative and predicted funding is diverging more negative, and squeeze risk remains high. Confidence is tempered because the spread is wide and the move is no longer early, but the continuation thesis is still alive.

BLUR is the strongest long-quality name in the list. Price is still up over 25% on 24h, funding is deeply negative and worsening, volume is solid, and spread is much better than TNSR. With veto clear and macro slightly improved, this is the best reduced-size long candidate in the current basket.
